name: Course Overview
description: Общая траектория курса и текущая стадия разработки Mini LM.

lessons.name: Mini Language Model Course
lessons.description: Обзор курса: dataset, tokenizer, baseline LM, neural LM, evaluation, generation и deployment demo.

name: Mini LM Labs
description: Практические лабораторные по созданию маленькой language model.

lessons.name: Lab 01: Dataset Preparation
lessons.description: Подготовка train/val/test split и описания датасета.

lessons.name: Lab 03: Bigram Character Language Model
lessons.description: Первый baseline language model: bigram counts, validation loss, perplexity и generated samples.

lessons.name: Lab 04: Neural Char LM
lessons.description: Маленькая neural character LM: training loop, loss, optimizer, validation и checkpoint.

lessons.name: Lab 05: Generation and Sampling
lessons.description: Prompt, max_new_tokens, temperature и stochastic sampling.

lessons.name: Lab 06: Evaluation
lessons.description: Validation loss, perplexity, overfitting и сравнение baseline vs neural model.

lessons.name: Lab 07: Deployment CLI/API Demo
lessons.description: Простой inference tool для генерации текста из checkpoint.

lessons.name: Lab 08: Raspberry Pi Edge Demo
lessons.description: Edge inference: CPU, RAM, latency и model size на Raspberry Pi.
